target: 3. Ushio's Proposal

…Ah, a nostalgic scene.
Still the same, huh~
You used to play around here often back then?
No, I wasn't really the type to play outside…

But when it rained, there were puddles over there,
and lots of water striders. I remember that.

Speaking of which, in Tokyo,
I don't get to see water striders much here.
Oh, really?

People who come from the city to this island
probably find the natural scenery attractive.

I see.
But if we're promoting the island's natural scenery,
isn't it important to highlight what's unique to this island?
That's the tricky part.
That's right…

Let's talk about school then.
Did you attend the local elementary and middle school?

Yeah, um…
I was on the library committee…
Mm, mm.

I spent all day
reading books in the library…
Uh… and that's it?

Ah, besides that…
the small school building,
and the small number of students…
That's about it, I guess.
…Hey, anything else?
Other than that… hmm, what else was there?

Oh! Right!
The festival in two days!

Didn't you enjoy the festival
when you were a kid, Kaori?

Yeah, I went there lots!
It was so fun~

We went with our families, ate takoyaki,
caught goldfish… The Umi-okuri was beautiful too.
Mm, mm, anything else?
But… that's about it, I guess.
S-so that's it…?

I'm sorry…
It's just… normal,
boring things, I guess.

Haha…
You don't need to apologize to us.

Anyway, let's walk around the island a bit more.
You might remember more things
than you think.
Found you!
Huh? Oh, Ushio!
I didn't expect to find you here, Shinpei!

Big sister?
Why are you here?
What's with the nonsense!

I've been waiting at the Kofune all this time,
but you didn't come back at all,
so I've been looking for you!

What were you two doing, Mio?
You said you'd call, but you didn't answer!

Huh?
…Oh, really.
I didn't notice.

Ah, me too.
I left it on mute at the town hall.

The town hall?
Why did you have to go there?
Ah, um…
Huh…?

Wait… um…
Could it be, Kaori?

Eh, eh!?
Oh, oh, you remember me!?

Yeah, I remember.
Of course I do.
You're definitely Kaori!
It's been forever!

Is it you, Ushio?
I'm happy… you remembered me.

Of course I remember.
There aren't many kids from elementary school left,
so it's weird if I forgot.
That's right, Shin-chan.
You probably didn't leave any impression on me.
Ugh…

But, what happened?
You coming back to the island
after so long…

Y-yeah…
Um…

Ah, I get it.
That's what happened!

I got it!
Leave it to me!

If you don't have memories,
let's make new ones together!
Ushio…

But what are we going to do
to make memories?
There's not much time until the festival.

Well, we'll figure it out
as we go!
Still full of energy, huh…
Shut up!

Haha…
Ushio, you haven't changed at all.
Still the same as before.

Yeah~… Wait, what?
You're saying that as a compliment, right?
Yeah, of course.

Haha, I see!
Thanks, Kaori.
…Oh! Right!
What's wrong?

I just remembered something!
<color=#GF_TIPS_095>Time capsule</color>!
Time capsule?

You know, we all put stuff in a time capsule
and buried it at school, right?
The one you did when you moved away.

Oh yeah, that happened…
I guess that was when Kaori moved away.
Y-yeah…

That's right, that's right.
We younger kids were forced to join too.

But a time capsule with island friends?
That's perfect for a talk show story!

Let's make the time capsule the main topic,
and talk about everyday memories
and the island's scenery.

It'll stay in the audience's memory,
and it'll promote the island too!

Yeah, having one big story
would really liven up the talk.

No time like the present!
Let's go dig it up right away!
Ah, um, wait a second…!
What's wrong?

Um, maybe…
it's better to dig it up
when we're older…

You're right, Kaori.
Normally, time capsules
are meant to be opened after decades.

That's right.
It's been seven years since we buried it…
It might still be too early.

It's fine.
Compared to back then,
we're already adults now.
S-Still, not that far yet…

Ugh!
Big sister, you're so troublesome.
You're way too pushy.

I mean… it's just that
Ushio wanted to see the contents, right?
So what if I did?
No, it's not like that…

Alright, decided!
Let's go then.
Wait, big sister!
Ugh… What should I do?
